author: Invalidity
text:
readme: tip on unique BALLS_IDENTITY per session

Add a short note to the BALLS_IDENTITY environment-variable
section recommending that agent harnesses inject a per-session
identity rather than asking the LLM to pick one. Models collapse
to the same handful of names across sessions, which causes claim
collisions. Suggests `shuf` from /usr/share/dict/words as a
portable recipe and points at SessionStart-style hooks (Claude
Code given as one example) for the wiring.
